name: podman
description: Manage containers, pods, and images with Podman

name: --detach-keys
options.description: Override the key sequence for detaching a container

name: --no-stdin
options.description: Do not attach STDIN

name: --sig-proxy
options.description: Proxy all received signals to the process (default true)

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Build an image using instructions from Containerfiles

args.name: strings
args.description: Images to consider as cache sources

name: --disable-content-trust
options.description: Skip image verification (default true)

name: -f
--file
options.description: Name of the Dockerfile (Default is 'PATH/Dockerfile')

name: --iidfile
options.description: Write the image ID to the file

name: --isolation
options.description: Container isolation technology

name: --label
options.description: Set metadata for an image

name: --network
options.description: Set the networking mode for the RUN instructions during build (default "default")

name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not use cache when building the image

name: -o
--output
options.description: Output destination (format: type=local,dest=path)

name: --platform
options.description: Set platform if server is multi-platform capable

name: --progress
options.description: Set type of progress output (auto, plain, tty). Use plain to show container output

name: --pull
options.description: Always attempt to pull a newer version of the image

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Suppress the build output and print image ID on success

name: --secret
options.description: Secret file to expose to the build (only if BuildKit enabled): id=mysecret,src=/local/secret

name: --squash
options.description: Squash newly built layers into a single new layer

name: --ssh
options.description: SSH agent socket or keys to expose to the build (only if BuildKit enabled) (format: default|<id>[=<socket>|<key>[,<key>]])

name: -t
--tag
options.description: Name and optionally a tag in the 'name:tag' format

name: --target
options.description: Set the target build stage to build

subcommands.name: commit
subcommands.description: Create new image based on the changed container

name: -a
--author
options.description: Author (e.g., "John Hannibal Smith <hannibal@a-team.com>")

name: -c
--change
options.description: Apply Dockerfile instruction to the created image

name: -m
--message
options.description: Commit message

name: -p
--pause
options.description: Pause container during commit (default true)

subcommands.name: cp
subcommands.description: Copy files/folders between a container and the local filesystem

name: -a
--archive
options.description: Archive mode (copy all uid/gid information)

name: -L
--follow-link
options.description: Always follow symbol link in SRC_PATH

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create but do not start a container

name: --add-host
options.description: Add a custom host-to-IP mapping (host:ip)

name: -a
--attach
options.description: Attach to STDIN, STDOUT or STDERR

name: --blkio-weight
options.description: Block IO (relative weight), between 10 and 1000, or 0 to disable (default 0)

name: --blkio-weight-device
options.description: Block IO weight (relative device weight) (default [])

name: --cap-add
options.description: Add Linux capabilities

name: --cap-drop
options.description: Drop Linux capabilities

name: --cgroup-parent
options.description: Optional parent cgroup for the container

name: --cgroupns
options.description: Cgroup namespace to use (host|private)

name: --cidfile
options.description: Write the container ID to the file

name: --cpu-period
options.description: Limit CPU CFS (Completely Fair Scheduler) period

name: --cpu-quota
options.description: Limit CPU CFS (Completely Fair Scheduler) quota

name: --cpu-rt-period
options.description: Limit CPU real-time period in microseconds

name: --cpu-rt-runtime
options.description: Limit CPU real-time runtime in microseconds

name: -c
--cpu-shares
options.description: CPU shares (relative weight)

name: --cpus
options.description: Number of CPUs

name: --cpuset-cpus
options.description: CPUs in which to allow execution (0-3, 0,1)

name: --cpuset-mems
options.description: MEMs in which to allow execution (0-3, 0,1)

name: --device
options.description: Add a host device to the container

name: --device-cgroup-rule
options.description: Add a rule to the cgroup allowed devices list

name: --device-read-bps
options.description: Limit read rate (bytes per second) from a device (default [])

name: --device-read-iops
options.description: Limit read rate (IO per second) from a device (default [])

name: --device-write-bps
options.description: Limit write rate (bytes per second) to a device (default [])

name: --device-write-iops
options.description: Limit write rate (IO per second) to a device (default [])

name: --disable-content-trust
options.description: Skip image verification (default true)

name: --dns
options.description: Set custom DNS servers

name: --dns-option
options.description: Set DNS options

name: --dns-search
options.description: Set custom DNS search domains

name: --domainname
options.description: Container NIS domain name

name: --entrypoint
options.description: Overwrite the default ENTRYPOINT of the image

name: -e
--env
options.description: Set environment variables

name: --env-file
options.description: Read in a file of environment variables

name: --expose
options.description: Expose a port or a range of ports

name: --gpus
options.description: GPU devices to add to the container ('all' to pass all GPUs)

name: --group-add
options.description: Add additional groups to join

name: --health-cmd
options.description: Command to run to check health

name: --health-interval
options.description: Time between running the check (ms|s|m|h) (default 0s)

name: --health-retries
options.description: Consecutive failures needed to report unhealthy

name: --health-start-period
options.description: Start period for the container to initialize before starting health-retries countdown (ms|s|m|h) (default 0s)

name: --health-timeout
options.description: Maximum time to allow one check to run (ms|s|m|h) (default 0s)

name: --help
options.description: Print usage

name: -h
--hostname
options.description: Container host name

name: --init
options.description: Run an init inside the container that forwards signals and reaps processes

name: -i
--interactive
options.description: Keep STDIN open even if not attached

name: --ip6
options.description: IPv6 address (e.g., 2001:db8::33)

name: --ipc
options.description: IPC mode to use

name: --isolation
options.description: Container isolation technology

name: --kernel-memory
options.description: Kernel memory limit

name: -l
--label
options.description: Set meta data on a container

name: --label-file
options.description: Read in a line delimited file of labels

name: --link
options.description: Add link to another container

name: --link-local-ip
options.description: Container IPv4/IPv6 link-local addresses

name: --log-driver
options.description: Logging driver for the container

name: --log-opt
options.description: Log driver options

name: --mac-address
options.description: Container MAC address (e.g., 92:d0:c6:0a:29:33)

name: -m
--memory
options.description: Memory limit

name: --memory-reservation
options.description: Memory soft limit

name: --memory-swap
options.description: Swap limit equal to memory plus swap: '-1' to enable unlimited swap

name: --memory-swappiness
options.description: Tune container memory swappiness (0 to 100) (default -1)

name: --mount
options.description: Attach a filesystem mount to the container

name: --name
options.description: Assign a name to the container

name: --network
options.description: Connect a container to a network

name: --network-alias
options.description: Add network-scoped alias for the container

name: --no-healthcheck
options.description: Disable any container-specified HEALTHCHECK

name: --oom-kill-disable
options.description: Disable OOM Killer

name: --oom-score-adj
options.description: Tune host's OOM preferences (-1000 to 1000)

name: --pid
options.description: PID namespace to use

name: --pids-limit
options.description: Tune container pids limit (set -1 for unlimited)

name: --platform
options.description: Set platform if server is multi-platform capable

name: --privileged
options.description: Give extended privileges to this container

name: -p
--publish
options.description: Publish a container's port(s) to the host

name: -P
--publish-all
options.description: Publish all exposed ports to random ports

name: --pull
options.description: Pull image before creating ("always"|"missing"|"never") (default "missing")

name: --read-only
options.description: Mount the container's root filesystem as read only

name: --restart
options.description: Restart policy to apply when a container exits (default "no")

name: --rm
options.description: Automatically remove the container when it exits

name: --runtime
options.description: Runtime to use for this container

name: --security-opt
options.description: Security Options

name: --shm-size
options.description: Size of /dev/shm

name: --stop-signal
options.description: Signal to stop a container (default "SIGTERM")

name: --stop-timeout
options.description: Timeout (in seconds) to stop a container

name: --storage-opt
options.description: Storage driver options for the container

name: --sysctl
options.description: Sysctl options (default map[])

name: --tmpfs
options.description: Mount a tmpfs directory

name: -t
--tty
options.description: Allocate a pseudo-TTY

name: --ulimit
options.description: Ulimit options (default [])

name: -u
--user
options.description: Username or UID (format: <name|uid>[:<group|gid>])

name: --userns
options.description: User namespace to use

name: --uts
options.description: UTS namespace to use

name: -v
--volume
options.description: Bind mount a volume

name: --volume-driver
options.description: Optional volume driver for the container

name: --volumes-from
options.description: Mount volumes from the specified container(s)

name: -w
--workdir
options.description: Working directory inside the container

subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.description: Display the changes to the object's file system

name: -f
--filter
options.description: Filter output based on conditions provided

name: --format
options.description: Format the output using the given Go template

name: --since
options.description: Show all events created since timestamp

name: --until
options.description: Stream events until this timestamp

name: -o

subcommands.name: history

name: --format
options.description: Pretty-print images using a Go template

name: -H
--human
options.description: Print sizes and dates in human readable format (default true)

name: --no-trunc
options.description: Don't truncate output

--quiet

--all
options.description: Show all images (default hides intermediate images)

--filter
options.description: Filter output based on conditions provided

--change

--message

name: --platform

name: -f
--format

subcommands.name: inspect
subcommands.description: Display the configuration of object denoted by ID

name: -f
--format
options.description: Format the output using the given Go template

name: -s
--size
options.description: Display total file sizes if the type is container

name: --type
options.description: Return JSON for specified type

subcommands.name: kill
subcommands.description: Kill one or more running containers with a specific signal

--signal
options.description: Signal to send to the container (default "KILL")

subcommands.description: Load image(s) from a tar archive

options.description: Read from tar archive file, instead of STDIN

--quiet
options.description: Suppress the load output

subcommands.description: Log in to a container registry

name: -p
--password
options.description: Password

options.description: Take the password from stdin

name: -u
--username
options.description: Username

subcommands.name: logout
subcommands.description: Log out of a container registry

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.description: Fetch the logs of one or more containers

name: --details
options.description: Show extra details provided to logs

name: -f
--follow
options.description: Follow log output

name: --since
options.description: Show logs since timestamp (e.g. 2013-01-02T13:23:37Z) or relative (e.g. 42m for 42 minutes)

name: -n
--tail
options.description: Number of lines to show from the end of the logs (default "all")

name: -t
--timestamps
options.description: Show timestamps

name: --until
options.description: Show logs before a timestamp (e.g. 2013-01-02T13:23:37Z) or relative (e.g. 42m for 42 minutes)

subcommands.name: pause
subcommands.description: Pause all processes within one or more containers

subcommands.name: port
subcommands.description: List port mappings or a specific mapping for the container

--all
options.description: Show all containers (default shows just running)

--filter
options.description: Filter output based on conditions provided

name: --format
options.description: Pretty-print containers using a Go template

name: -n
--last
options.description: Show n last created containers (includes all states) (default -1)

--latest
options.description: Show the latest created container (includes all states)

options.description: Don't truncate output

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Only display container IDs

name: -s
--size
options.description: Display total file sizes

name: --cgroupns
options.description:
Cgroup namespace to use (host|private)
'host':    Run the container in the Docker host's cgroup namespace
'private': Run the container in its own private cgroup namespace
'':        Use the cgroup namespace as configured by the
default-cgroupns-mode option on the daemon (default)

subcommands.name: compose
subcommands.description: Run compose workloads via an external provider such as docker-compose or podman-compose

name: --build-arg
options.description: Set build-time variables for services

name: --compress
options.description: Compress the build context using gzip. DEPRECATED

name: --force-rm
options.description: Always remove intermediate containers. DEPRECATED

name: --memory
-m
options.description: Set memory limit for the build container. Not supported on buildkit yet

name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not use cache when building the image

name: --no-rm
options.description: Do not remove intermediate containers after a successful build. DEPRECATED

name: --parallel
options.description: Build images in parallel. DEPRECATED

name: --progress
options.description: Set type of progress output (auto, tty, plain, quiet)

name: --pull
options.description: Always attempt to pull a newer version of the image

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Don't print anything to STDOUT

name: --ssh
options.description: Set SSH authentications used when building service images. (use 'default' for using your default SSH Agent)

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Converts the compose file to platform's canonical format

name: --format
options.description: Format the output. Values: [yaml | json]

name: --hash
options.description: Print the service config hash, one per line

name: --images
options.description: Print the image names, one per line

name: --no-interpolate
options.description: Don't interpolate environment variables

name: --no-normalize
options.description: Don't normalize compose model

name: --output
-o
options.description: Save to file (default to stdout)

name: --profiles
options.description: Print the profile names, one per line

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Only validate the configuration, don't print anything

name: --resolve-image-digests
options.description: Pin image tags to digests

name: --services
options.description: Print the service names, one per line

name: --volumes
options.description: Print the volume names, one per line

subcommands.name: cp
subcommands.description: Copy files/folders between a service container and the local filesystem

name: --all
options.description: Copy to all the containers of the service

name: --archive
-a
options.description: Archive mode (copy all uid/gid information)

name: --follow-link
-L
options.description: Always follow symbol link in SRC_PATH

name: --index
options.description: Index of the container if there are multiple instances of a service

name: --build
options.description: Build images before starting containers

name: --force-recreate
options.description: Recreate containers even if their configuration and image haven't changed

name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build an image, even if it's missing

name: --no-recreate
options.description: If containers already exist, don't recreate them. Incompatible with --force-recreate

name: --remove-orphans
options.description: Remove containers for services not defined in the Compose file

name: --rmi
options.description: Remove images used by services. "local" remove only images that don't have a custom tag ("local"|"all")

name: --timeout
-t
options.description: Specify a shutdown timeout in seconds

name: --volumes
-v
options.description: Remove named volumes declared in the `volumes` section of the Compose file and anonymous volumes attached to containers

subcommands.description: Receive real time events from containers

name: --json
options.description: Output events as a stream of json objects

-d
options.description: Detached mode: Run command in the background

-e
options.description: Set environment variables

name: --index
options.description: Index of the container if there are multiple instances of a service [default: 1]

name: --interactive
-i
options.description: Keep STDIN open even if not attached

-T
options.description: Disable pseudo-TTY allocation. By default `docker compose exec` allocates a TTY

options.description: Give extended privileges to the process

name: --tty
-t
options.description: Allocate a pseudo-TTY

-u
options.description: Run the command as this user

name: --workdir
-w
options.description: Path to workdir directory for this command

-t
options.description: Show timestamps

options.description: Show logs before a timestamp (e.g. 2013-01-02T13:23:37Z) or relative (e.g. 42m for 42 minutes)

-a
options.description: Show all stopped Compose projects

options.description: Filter output based on conditions provided

name: --format
options.description: Format the output. Values: [pretty | json]

name: --quiet
-q
options.description: Only display IDs

-a

-q

-q
options.description: Pull without printing progress information

options.description: Push what it can and ignores images with push failures

-t
options.description: Specify a shutdown timeout in seconds

-a

-f
options.description: Don't ask to confirm removal

-v

-e

-T

options.description: Don't start linked services

-p

name: --quiet-pull
options.description: Pull without printing progress information

-t

-u

name: --timeout
-t
options.description: Specify a shutdown timeout in seconds

options.description: Stops all containers if any container was stopped. Incompatible with -d

name: --always-recreate-deps
options.description: Recreate dependent containers. Incompatible with --no-recreate

name: --attach
options.description: Attach to service output

name: --attach-dependencies
options.description: Attach to dependent containers

name: --build
options.description: Build images before starting containers

name: --detach
-d
options.description: Detached mode: Run containers in the background

name: --exit-code-from
options.description: Return the exit code of the selected service container. Implies --abort-on-container-exit

name: --force-recreate
options.description: Recreate containers even if their configuration and image haven't changed

name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build an image, even if it's missing

name: --no-color
options.description: Produce monochrome output

name: --no-deps
options.description: Don't start linked services

name: --no-log-prefix
options.description: Don't print prefix in logs

name: --no-recreate
options.description: If containers already exist, don't recreate them. Incompatible with --force-recreate

name: --no-start
options.description: Don't start the services after creating them

name: --quiet-pull
options.description: Pull without printing progress information

name: --remove-orphans
options.description: Remove containers for services not defined in the Compose file

name: --renew-anon-volumes
-V
options.description: Recreate anonymous volumes instead of retrieving data from the previous containers

name: --scale
options.description: Scale SERVICE to NUM instances. Overrides the `scale` setting in the Compose file if present

name: --timeout
-t
options.description: Use this timeout in seconds for container shutdown when attached or when containers are already running

name: --wait
options.description: Wait for services to be running|healthy. Implies detached mode
